column1: [1b | rows-as-records + headerAxis:row | all-pivot 1 segment (row 1 = quarter axis labels)]
[1c | rows-as-records + headerAxis:row | 2 segments no statics (quarter + month in one header row)]
[1d | rows-as-records + headerAxis:row | mixed: statics + 1 segment (name/industry + quarter)]
[1e | rows-as-records + headerAxis:row | CANONICAL mixed statics + 2 segments (name/industry + quarter + month)]
[1f | rows-as-records + headerAxis:row | mixed + skip (static + pivot + Total col to skip)]
[2b | columns-as-records + headerAxis:column | all-pivot 1 segment (col 1 = quarter axis labels)]
[2c | columns-as-records + headerAxis:column | 2 segments no statics (quarter + month in one header col)]
[2d | columns-as-records + headerAxis:column | mixed: statics + 1 segment (name/industry + quarter)]
[2e | columns-as-records + headerAxis:column | canonical transpose: statics + 2 segments]
[2f | columns-as-records + headerAxis:column | mixed + skip (Total row to skip)]
[3b | rows-as-records + headerAxis:column | N-segments (header column holds two records-axes)]
[4b | columns-as-records + headerAxis:row | N-segments (header row holds two records-axes)]
[7 | cells-as-records | flat crosstab (existing; no segmentation in v1)]
